mapper.insert: insert into reward_grant_record(id, grant_id, user_id, grant_type, source_event_id, source_event_type, growth_delta, reward_delta, status) values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{grantId}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{grantType}, #{sourceEventId}, #{sourceEventType}, #{growthDelta}, #{rewardDelta}, #{status})
